emails.subject: Aspect Amendment
emails.body: Judy attached is the Aspect Amendment as discussed. The first paragraph has been revised to reflect the assignment to ENA. Article 2. now states term dates. Concerning Articles 3.1 and 3.3, Gerald would not agree to "one sentence". Finally, I included a provision regarding changes to working interest (see 9), and incorporated meter number on Schedule I. Please let me know if you have any other questions and or changes. Debra Perlingiere Enron North America Legal 1400 Smith Street, EB 3885 Houston, Texas 77002 dperlin@enron 713-853-7658 713-646-3490 Fax

emails.subject: FW: Aspect Amendment
emails.body: FW: Aspect Amendment Debra, Jill is ready to finalize the Aspect Amendment and send it to them today to sign. I have editted the amendment that you provided to include the new pricing as well as the Keep Whole language. Please review the revised pricing section and advise if we can remove the "DRAFT" from the amendment and send it to the customer(s) to sign. Thanks, Judy To: Thorne, Judy

emails.subject: FW: Aspect Amendment
emails.body: Here is the editted version of the amendment.
